analysis: Loos & Co. manufactures aircraft cable, wire rope, cable assemblies, hardware/fittings, and CNC-machined components for aerospace, defense, military, automotive, medical, and other commercial industries.

codes.reasoning: The company explicitly manufactures wire rope and aircraft cable in multiple alloys to commercial and military specifications.
codes.evidence: Wire Rope When looking for the highest quality domestic Wire Rope in stainless steel, galvanized, bright carbon steel and a variety of other alloys, we deliver.

codes.reasoning: The company manufactures fittings and accessories for wire rope and cable, directly matching this FSC category.
codes.evidence: Hardware & Fittings​ Loos & Co., Inc. has long been a manufacturer of high-quality wire rope fittings and accessories for a variety of industries.

codes.description: Cable, Cord, Wire Assemblies; Communications Equipment
codes.reasoning: The company manufactures cable assemblies for aerospace and defense communications and control applications.
codes.evidence: Cable Assemblies​ We maintain large inventories of both bare and coated cable as well as fittings to satisfy your immediate needs.

codes.reasoning: The company produces commercial hardware including bushings and fittings for a variety of industries.
codes.evidence: We specialize in manufacturing high-quality Aerospace & Defense Cables, Cable Assemblies, Hardware, Bushings and more.

codes.reasoning: The company specifically mentions manufacturing bushings as part of their product line, which falls under this FSC category.
codes.evidence: We specialize in manufacturing high-quality Aerospace & Defense Cables, Cable Assemblies, Hardware, Bushings and more.

codes.reasoning: The company manufactures nonelectrical wire including aircraft cable in stainless steel, galvanized carbon steel, and other alloys.

codes.reasoning: The company supplies aerospace and defense cables and assemblies that serve as structural components for airframes.
codes.evidence: We specialize in manufacturing high-quality Aerospace & Defense Cables, Cable Assemblies, Hardware, Bushings and more.

codes.reasoning: The company manufactures wire rope and rigging gear applicable to marine and ship applications.
codes.evidence: Wire Rope When looking for the highest quality domestic Wire Rope in stainless steel, galvanized, bright carbon steel and a variety of other alloys, we deliver.

codes.reasoning: The company produces wire rope and fittings/slings used in block, tackle, rigging, and sling applications.
codes.evidence: Hardware & Fittings​ Loos & Co., Inc. has long been a manufacturer of high-quality wire rope fittings and accessories for a variety of industries.

codes.reasoning: The company produces MIL-SPEC hardware and fittings specifically for weapon system applications in defense contexts.
codes.evidence: A recognized leader in the field of Mil-Spec hardware and wire rope fittings, our CNC parts supply to most major distributors and industries around the globe.
